name: two-player-games
description: Bộ trò chơi 2 người: chơi chung máy hoặc online qua mạng

scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/games.test.js tests/stats.test.js tests/i18n.test.js tests/i18n-runtime.test.js tests/i18n-source-guard.test.js
scripts.test:online: node tests/reconnect-it.js && node tests/publicrooms-it.js && node tests/chat-it.js
scripts.test: node scripts/smoke-test.js && node --test tests/games.test.js tests/stats.test.js tests/i18n.test.js tests/i18n-runtime.test.js tests/i18n-source-guard.test.js && node tests/reconnect-it.js && node tests/publicrooms-it.js && node tests/chat-it.js
